settings.title: Free Induction Week for New Members
settings.excerpt: Through the second half of April, every new member gets a free hour walking through the floor with a coach.
settings.body:
Walking into a busy gym for the first time can be daunting, and a wall of unfamiliar machines does not help. For the back half of April we are running free induction sessions for anyone who joins.

In an hour, one of our coaches will show you how the main equipment works, sketch out a simple starting routine, and answer the questions people are often too shy to ask.

What the hour covers

We keep it practical and unhurried. The session is built around getting you comfortable, not impressing you with the kit:

  • A walk around the main machines and how to set them safely.
  • A simple starting routine you can follow on your own.
  • Time for the questions people usually feel too awkward to ask.

You will leave knowing exactly what to do on your next three visits, instead of wandering between machines hoping for the best.

Coming in nervous is normal

If the idea of the gym makes you anxious, you are in good company, and that is rather the point of this. Almost everyone on the floor felt the same on their first day. Our coaches do these inductions because a calm first visit is what makes people come back for a second.

There is no need to prepare anything. Wear something you can move in, bring a bottle of water, and arrive a few minutes early so we can start on time.

Book your slot at the front desk when you sign up. There is no charge and no sales pitch attached.
